title: Write canary test suite
description:
AI-generated by sentinel-qa (QA/Security):

registerModule('Canary Test Suite', function(g) {
  g._canary = g._canary || {
    tests: [],
    results: [],
    tamperedIndices: [],
    scanTimer: 0,
    scanInterval: 90,
    revealTimer: 0,
    alerts: [],
    checksums: {},
    initialized: false,
    pulsePhase: 0,
    lastFailCount: 0,
    glitchFrames: 0,
    sentinels: []
  };

  var c = g._canary;
  var ctx = g.ctx;
  var W = g.canvas.width;
  var H = g.canvas.height;

  // Initialize canary sentinels and hidden test suite
  if (!c.initialized) {
    c.initialized = true;

    // Define hidden canary values — baseline fingerprints
    c.checksums = {
      speedBase: g.speed,
      tickMod: g.tick % 7,
      piCheck: Math.PI,
      sqrtCheck: Math.sqrt(2),
      sinCheck: Math.sin(0),
      consoleType: typeof console,
      mathType: typeof Math.random,
      canvasType: typeof g.canvas,
      stageBase: g.stage
    };

    // Build test suite
    c.tests = [
      { id: 'T01', name: 'SPEED_INTEGRITY',    desc: 'Base speed unmodified',      fn: function() { return Math.abs(g.speed - c.checksums.speedBase) < 0.001; } },
      { id: 'T02', name: 'PI_CONSTANT',        desc: 'Math.PI unchanged',           fn: function() { return Math.PI === c.checksums.piCheck; } },
      { id: 'T03', name: 'SQRT_COHERENCE',     desc: 'sqrt(2) stable',              fn: function() { return Math.sqrt(2) === c.checksums.sqrtCheck; } },
      { id: 'T04', name: 'SIN_ZERO',           desc: 'sin(0) === 0',                fn: function() { return Math.sin(0) === 0; } },
      { id: 'T05', name: 'COS_ZERO',           desc: 'cos(0) === 1',                fn: function() { return Math.cos(0) === 1; } },
      { id: 'T06', name: 'RAND_BOUNDS',        desc: 'rand() stays in [0,1)',       fn: function() { var r = Math.random(); return r >= 0 && r < 1; } },
      { id: 'T07', name: 'TICK_MONOTONE',      desc: 'tick always increases',       fn: function() { return g.tick > 0; } },
      { id: 'T08', name: 'SCORE_NONNEG',       desc: 'score non-negative',          fn: function() { return g.score >= 0; } },
      { id: 'T09', name: 'STAGE_BOUNDS',       desc: 'stage within 0-5',           fn: function() { return g.stage >= 0 && g.stage <= 5; } },
      { id: 'T10', name: 'LERP_IDENTITY',      desc: 'lerp(a,a,t) === a',          fn: function() { return g.lerp(42, 42, 0.5) === 42; } },
      { id: 'T11', name: 'LERP_MIDPOINT',      desc: 'lerp(0,10,0.5) === 5',       fn: function() { return Math.abs(g.lerp(0, 10, 0.5) - 5) < 0.001; } },
      { id: 'T12', name: 'DIST_SELF',          desc: 'dist(p,p) === 0',            fn: function() { return g.dist({x:0,y:0},{x:0,y:0}) === 0; } },
      { id: 'T13', name: 'DIST_345',           desc: 'Pythagorean triple intact',  fn: function() { return Math.abs(g.dist({x:0,y:0},{x:3,y:4}) - 5) < 0.001; } },
      { id: 'T14', name: 'VELOCITY_FINITE',    desc: 'player velocity is finite',  fn: function() { return isFinite(g.vx) && isFinite(g.vy); } },
      { id: 'T15', name: 'POSITION_FINITE',    desc: 'player position is finite',  fn: function() { return isFinite(g.px) && isFinite(g.py); } },
      { id: 'T16', name: 'CANVAS_PRESENT',     desc: 'canvas context valid',       fn: function() { return !!ctx && typeof ctx.fillRect === 'function'; } },
      { id: 'T17', name: 'PARTICLES_ARRAY',    desc: 'particles array intact',     fn: function() { return Array.isArray(g.particles); } },
      { id: 'T18', name: 'ENTITIES_ARRAY',     desc: 'entities array intact',      fn: function() { return Array.isArray(g.entities); } },
      { id: 'T19', name: 'KEYS_OBJECT',        desc: 'keys map is an object',      fn: function() { return typeof g.keys === 'object' && g.keys !== null; } },
      { id: 'T20', name: 'LOG_COHERENCE',      desc: 'log(1) === 0',               fn: function() { return Math.log(1) === 0; } },
      { id: 'T21', name: 'ABSORBED_NONNEG',    desc: 'absorbed count clean',
designRationale: AI-generated module: Canary Test Suite. Agent: sentinel-qa (QA/Security).
